02 — About

Who I am

I'm bgdrak, a self-driven developer specializing in AI-powered applications and cross-platform mobile development. I build systems that are fast, intelligent, and solve real problems.

My work spans full-stack web, machine learning integration and Flutter engineering. I'm drawn to the intersection of emerging tech and human impact — giving farmers AI diagnostics in their hands, or lawyers instant access to legal intelligence.

"I don't just write code. I engineer solutions that outlive the sprint."

Currently building Monia (AI legal analysis) and AgroSika (crop disease diagnostics). Always learning. Always shipping.

03 — Projects

What I've built

Real applications. Real impact.

01
Mo
AI · Legal
★ Flagship

Monia

AI-powered legal analysis tool built with RAG architecture. Lawyers and citizens query complex legal documents in natural language, get cited answers and risk assessments — in seconds. Built with FastAPI, LangChain and a vector database backend.
